summary: The threshold for each Attribute should be listed

mechanics.name_guess: The threshold for each Attribute should be listed
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 057 > npcs > The threshold for each Attribute should be listed
mechanics.excerpt: The threshold for each Attribute should be listed on your character creation worksheet: The cost in Character Points to raise an Attribute up to its threshold IS equal to the desired Attribute value_ Raising it above the threshold costs 2 addition- Character Points for every point above the threshold Charisma (CHA) Charisma represents character presence charm and persuasiveness Related skills include those that involve inter- personae contact, such as Leadership and Negotiation.
